workspace.title: Threads Official Tools
workspace.subtitle: Validate and open an official Threads post or Meta's official data-export help; content is never scraped automatically.
workspace.initial_preview: Enable a child MOD to open an official post or data-export help.
workspace.wrong_site: Only official threads.com or migrated threads.net post URLs are accepted.

ui.boundary: This MOD does not parse, collect, or download Threads content and never reads cookies.
ui.page_disabled: Enable the Official Post child MOD first.
ui.export_disabled: Enable the Data Export child MOD first.
ui.invalid_url: The URL is not an allowed official Threads post page.
ui.opened_page: The official Threads post was opened in the system browser.
ui.opened_export: Meta's official Threads data-export help was opened.
ui.browser_failed: The system browser could not be opened.

threads.name: Threads parent MOD
threads.purpose: Manage Threads official tools and child MODs

threads-page.name: Official post
threads-page.purpose: Validate an official Threads post URL and open it in the browser
threads-page.control_location: Threads Official Tools → Open official post

threads-export.name: Data export
threads-export.purpose: Open Meta's official Threads data-export help
threads-export.control_location: Threads Official Tools → Official data export
